title: Chinese Group Chery Accelerates Rollout of New Models In South Africa
description:
Chinese auto giant Chery has been ramping up its presence in South Africa over the last couple of years. Chinese vehicles in general are gaining traction in South Africa’s overall new vehicles sales market with Chery Group, when we include sales from Jetour, Jaecoo, and Omoda, as well as Chery ... [continued]

The post Chinese Group Chery Accelerates Rollout of New Models In South Africa appeared first on CleanTechnica.
